cases.title: TS-17: Active session QR token rotates every 30 seconds with accurate countdown
preconditions: Active session with QR scheduler running after POST /sessions/:sessionId/open
Authenticated Instructor with qr:display permission for the session
TestClock injectable and fixed at token issuance time T
steps: GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/qr/current with Instructor session and capture tokenId, issuedAt, expiresAt, secondsRemaining at time T
Advance TestClock to T + 30 seconds and trigger QrService.rotateTokens or wait for scheduler tick
GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/qr/current again and capture new tokenId
Assert new tokenId differs from first tokenId
Assert secondsRemaining is between 29 and 30 inclusive (±1 s per NFR-06)
Assert expiresAt equals issuedAt + 30 seconds
cases.expected: New QR token issued every 30 s per FR-06 and AC-06a; countdown accurate ±1 s; previous token marked Expired in database

cases.title: TS-18: Check-in with token scanned at T + 31 seconds returns ExpiredQr
preconditions: Active session with enrolled Student authenticated
QrToken issued at time T with status Valid in database
TestClock fixed at T + 31 seconds
Student coordinates within session gpsRadiusMeters
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with tokenId from token issued at T, valid latitude/longitude using Student session
Assert HTTP status 400
Assert response outcome ExpiredQr and errorCode ExpiredQr
Assert response message is Mã QR đã hết hạn, vui lòng quét mã mới
GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/attendance for student and assert status remains Pending
cases.expected: Expired tokens rejected per FR-06 and BR-03; ExpiredQr outcome with Vietnamese message; attendance unchanged

cases.title: TS-19: GET /sessions/:sessionId/qr/current when session not Active returns no valid token
preconditions: Draft session exists (status Draft) with valid GPS configured
Closed session exists (status Closed) from prior workshop
Authenticated Instructor with assignment to both sessions
steps: GET /api/v1/sessions/:draftSessionId/qr/current with Instructor session
Assert HTTP 403 or 422 with errorCode SessionNotActive or no qrPayload in response body
GET /api/v1/sessions/:closedSessionId/qr/current with Instructor session
Assert same session-not-active rejection with no valid tokenId or qrPayload
Query qr_tokens table for both sessionIds and assert no Valid token rows exist
cases.expected: No valid QR token issued when session is not Active per FR-06 and AC-06c; API rejects or returns empty invalid payload

cases.title: QrService.rotateTokens persists new Valid token and expires previous token in PostgreSQL
preconditions: Real PostgreSQL test database is running
Active session row exists with status Active
One Valid qr_tokens row exists for sessionId issued at T with expires_at T + 30 s
QrService.rotateTokens wired to QrTokenRepository
steps: Count qr_tokens rows with status Valid for sessionId (expect 1)
Invoke QrService.rotateTokens(sessionId) at TestClock T + 30 s
Query qr_tokens for sessionId ordered by issued_at DESC
Assert newest row has status Valid with expires_at = issued_at + 30 seconds
Assert previous token row status is Expired
cases.expected: Token rotation persists atomically per checkin-qr module; one Valid token at a time; previous Valid → Expired per FR-06 30-second cycle

cases.title: QrToken transitions Valid to Expired when ttlElapsed after 30-second window
preconditions: Valid qr_tokens row in PostgreSQL with issued_at at T and expires_at at T + 30 s
QrService or expiry job uses TestClock at T + 31 s
steps: Record beforeState Valid from qr_tokens table for tokenId
Invoke token expiry check via QrService.getCurrentToken or lazy ttlElapsed handler at T + 31 s
Query qr_tokens row for tokenId
Attempt CheckInService.submit with expired tokenId under enrolled Student context
cases.expected: beforeState Valid, afterState Expired; check-in submission returns ExpiredQr domain outcome per FR-06 expiry rule

cases.title: QrService.issueToken no-ops when session status is not Active
preconditions: Draft session row exists in PostgreSQL
Closed session row exists in PostgreSQL
QrService.rotateTokens and issueToken callable directly in test harness
steps: Invoke QrService.rotateTokens(draftSessionId)
Query qr_tokens for draftSessionId and assert zero Valid rows created
Invoke QrService.rotateTokens(closedSessionId)
Query qr_tokens for closedSessionId and assert zero new Valid rows after close
cases.expected: QR issuance only while session Active per FR-06; rotateTokens no-ops for Draft and Closed sessions

cases.title: GET /sessions/:sessionId/qr/current returns 200 with QrTokenDisplay DTO for Active session
preconditions: Instructor session cookie is set
Active sessionId with QR scheduler running and at least one Valid token
steps: Send GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/qr/current with Instructor session
Assert HTTP status 200
Assert response body contains sessionId, tokenId, qrPayload, issuedAt, expiresAt, secondsRemaining, attendanceWindowClosesAt
Assert qrPayload matches wecheck://check-in?token=uuid&session=uuid deep link format encoding one-time-use token bound to session
Assert secondsRemaining is between 1 and 30 inclusive
cases.expected: HTTP 200 with full QrTokenDisplay contract per API design §6.1; valid payload for instructor display per FR-06

cases.title: POST /check-in with expired token returns 400 ExpiredQr envelope
preconditions: Authenticated enrolled Student session available
Expired qr_tokens row exists for Active session (status Expired or past expires_at)
Student coordinates within session radius
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with expired tokenId, latitude 10.762700, longitude 106.660200 using Student session
Assert HTTP status 400
Assert response body outcome ExpiredQr and errorCode ExpiredQr
Assert response body message Mã QR đã hết hạn, vui lòng quét mã mới
cases.expected: HTTP 400 ExpiredQr per API design §6.3; expired tokens rejected per FR-06

cases.title: Student denied GET /sessions/:sessionId/qr/current with 403 Forbidden
preconditions: Authenticated Student session is available
Active sessionId with valid QR token exists
Student role lacks qr:display permission per roles-permissions §2.3
steps: GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/qr/current using Student session cookie
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden
Assert response errorCode Forbidden with localized permission-denied message
Verify no qrPayload or tokenId returned in response body
cases.expected: Student cannot access instructor QR display endpoint; HTTP 403 per FR-06 qr:display enforcement

cases.title: Instructor denied GET /sessions/:sessionId/qr/current for unassigned session
preconditions: Authenticated Instructor A session is available
Active session owned by Instructor B for class HESD-02 (Instructor A not assigned)
Instructor A lacks qr:display scope for Instructor B session per assignment rules
steps: GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/qr/current using Instructor A session cookie
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden and errorCode Forbidden
Assert no qrPayload returned
cases.expected: QR display scoped to assigned instructor sessions; cross-instructor access denied with 403 per FR-06

cases.title: Check-in at T + 29 seconds succeeds; at T + 31 seconds returns ExpiredQr
preconditions: Active session with enrolled Student authenticated
Two distinct Valid QrToken rows or controlled TestClock for same token issued at T
Student coordinates within radius; no prior Present for session
steps: Set TestClock to T + 29 seconds and POST /api/v1/check-in with tokenId using Student session
Assert HTTP 200 with outcome Success (token still within 30 s window)
Issue fresh token at T2 for second student or reset fixture
Set TestClock to T2 + 31 seconds and POST /api/v1/check-in with that tokenId
Assert HTTP 400 with outcome ExpiredQr and Vietnamese expiry message
cases.expected: BR-03 boundary enforced per FR-06: token valid at 29 s, rejected at 31 s; no exceptions to 30-second absolute window

cases.title: QrToken expires_at is exactly issued_at plus 30 seconds in database
preconditions: Active session in PostgreSQL
QrService.issueToken invoked at fixed TestClock instant T
steps: Invoke QrService.issueToken(sessionId) at T
Query qr_tokens row for newest token
Assert expires_at minus issued_at equals 30 seconds
Assert status is Valid immediately after issuance
cases.expected: Token TTL stored as issued_at + 30 seconds per FR-06 and BR-03; enforces hard expiry boundary

cases.title: Flow A step 3: Poll GET /sessions/:id/qr/current until valid token received for student check-in
preconditions: Instructor opened Draft session to Active (Flow A steps 1–2 complete)
Authenticated Instructor session available
QR scheduler started on session open per FR-05 side effect
steps: Poll GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/qr/current every 5 seconds with Instructor session until HTTP 200
Capture tokenId and qrPayload from first successful response
Assert secondsRemaining ≤ 30 and qrPayload encodes session and one-time-use token deep link
Pass tokenId to subsequent student POST /api/v1/check-in in Flow A step 4
cases.expected: Flow A QR polling step succeeds per testing-plan §6 Flow A; instructor display token ready for student scan per FR-06

cases.title: Flow B step 6: Expired token submission returns ExpiredQr anti-fraud rejection
preconditions: Active session with valid QR from GET /sessions/:id/qr/current (Flow B step 1)
Student A already checked in successfully (Flow B steps 2–3 complete)
TestClock advanced so original token from step 1 is past 30 s expiry
steps: POST /api/v1/check-in with expired tokenId from Flow B step 1 using enrolled Student C session
Assert HTTP 400 with outcome ExpiredQr and errorCode ExpiredQr
Assert Vietnamese message Mã QR đã hết hạn, vui lòng quét mã mới
Verify Student C attendance remains Pending
cases.expected: Flow B anti-fraud path validates FR-06 expired QR rejection alongside duplicate and radius failures

cases.title: QR scheduler issues tokens at 30 s ± 1 s intervals under fixed TestClock
preconditions: Active session with QrService scheduler started in test environment
TestClock advances in 30-second increments
qr_tokens table accessible for timestamp inspection
steps: Record issued_at of first token at T0
Advance clock 30 s and trigger scheduler tick; record second token issued_at at T1
Advance clock 30 s and trigger scheduler tick; record third token issued_at at T2
Assert T1 minus T0 is between 29 and 31 seconds inclusive
Assert T2 minus T1 is between 29 and 31 seconds inclusive
cases.expected: Token issuance cadence meets NFR-06 target of 30 s ± 1 s; supports FR-06 automatic refresh cycle

cases.title: Concurrent rotateTokens calls for same session yield single new Valid token
preconditions: Active session in PostgreSQL with one Valid qr_tokens row
QrService.rotateTokens invocable concurrently from parallel test workers
Database transaction isolation at READ COMMITTED or higher
steps: Launch two parallel QrService.rotateTokens(sessionId) calls at same TestClock instant
Await both operations to settle
Count qr_tokens rows with status Valid for sessionId
Assert exactly one Valid token exists
Assert previous Valid token is Expired
cases.expected: No duplicate Valid tokens under concurrent rotation; scheduler idempotency preserves FR-06 single active token invariant

cases.title: Each issued QrToken encodes unique one-time-use identifier bound to session
preconditions: Active session in PostgreSQL
QrService.issueToken invoked twice at T and T + 30 s via rotateTokens
steps: Invoke QrService.issueToken(sessionId) at T and capture tokenId1
Invoke QrService.rotateTokens(sessionId) at T + 30 s and capture tokenId2
Query qr_tokens for both tokenIds and assert session_id matches Active sessionId
Assert tokenId1 differs from tokenId2
Assert each row has unique id and status Valid or Expired respectively
cases.expected: Each token is a unique one-time-use identifier bound to session per FR-06 and BR-11 consumption model

cases.title: Instructor QR display tab auto-refreshes QR image and shows visible countdown every 30 s
preconditions: Instructor is logged in to instructor SPA
Active session exists for assigned class HESD-01
Instructor navigates to session detail QR tab (/sessions/:id with QR panel visible)
steps: Verify QrCodeImage component renders scannable QR code
Verify QrCountdown shows seconds remaining (e.g. Mã mới sau X giây) between 1 and 30
Wait 30 seconds and observe QR image src or token payload change
Verify countdown resets to approximately 30 seconds after refresh
Verify countdown decrements visibly each second without full page reload
cases.expected: Instructor-facing display refreshes automatically each 30 s cycle with visible remaining seconds per FR-06

cases.title: Instructor fullscreen QR presentation at /sessions/:id/qr-present for projector display
preconditions: Instructor is logged in with Active session in progress
Browser viewport set to 1280×720 per device matrix
Instructor clicks Trình chiếu QR or navigates to /sessions/:id/qr-present
steps: Verify FullscreenLayout renders large QR code readable at 5 m simulated scale
Verify countdown timer visible and updating
Wait one 30-second rotation cycle and verify QR image updates
Verify no instructor navigation chrome obscures QR (fullscreen mode)
cases.expected: Fullscreen QR presentation rotates every 30 s per FR-06; suitable for classroom projector per NFR-20

cases.title: QR display shows session-not-active state when session is Draft or Closed
preconditions: Instructor is logged in to instructor SPA
Draft session with GPS configured exists (not yet opened)
Closed session from prior workshop exists
steps: Navigate to QR tab on Draft session detail page
Verify illustration and message Buổi học chưa mở displayed
Verify no QR image rendered and no polling requests to /qr/current succeed with 200
Navigate to Closed session QR tab and verify same session-not-active state with ended-session messaging
cases.expected: UI shows session-not-active state per FR-06; no valid QR token displayed when session not Active

cases.title: Student check-in page shows ExpiredQr message after scanning stale QR
preconditions: Authenticated Student on mobile viewport (375px width)
Active session with QR token older than 30 seconds (simulated via deep link with expired tokenId)
Student GPS permission granted and coordinates within radius
steps: Student opens check-in deep link wecheck://check-in?token=expired&session=:id
Student submits check-in after GPS capture
Verify error panel displays Mã QR đã hết hạn, vui lòng quét mã mới
Verify Quét lại action returns student to scanner view
cases.expected: Student UI surfaces FR-06 expired token rejection with Vietnamese message and retry path

cases.title: TrainingOfficeAdmin denied GET /sessions/:sessionId/qr/current without qr:display scope
preconditions: Authenticated TrainingOfficeAdmin session is available
Active session owned by assigned Instructor for HESD-01
Admin has session:read institution-wide but lacks qr:display for instructor-owned sessions per MVP policy
steps: GET /api/v1/sessions/:sessionId/qr/current using TrainingOfficeAdmin session cookie
Assert HTTP status 403 Forbidden and errorCode Forbidden
Assert no qrPayload or tokenId returned
cases.expected: QR display restricted to Instructor with qr:display on owned session; admin cannot view rotating QR per FR-06
